purpose: Family-level acceptance definition for building, migrating, and taking over OPL-standard Foundry Agents without repeating registry-sampled stage-route, authority, projection, and legacy-residue failure modes.
machine_boundary: This contract defines standard-agent landing acceptance gates and false-completion rules for OPL, agent generators, and domain repos. Registered domain and agent package names are sample or registry data, not base framework invariants. This contract does not declare registered domain readiness, target-agent readiness, App release readiness, Brand L5, physical delete authorization, production readiness, owner receipt creation, typed blocker creation, quality/export/review verdicts, or live deliverable progress.

standard_agent_definition.source_shape: Declarative Domain Pack + OPL generated/hosted surfaces + Domain Minimal Authority Kernel
domain_repo_must_provide: stage graph and stage control refs
prompt / skill / knowledge / quality gate refs
owner receipt or typed blocker schema refs

requires: canonical agent/ pack root exists
stage control refs point to non-empty prompt / skill / knowledge / quality gate refs or explicit skill ids
stage pack declares selected executor, expected receipt or typed blocker, authority boundary, and independent gate policy
source shape conformance forbids prose-only, README-only, empty scaffold, or src/packages-only semantic pack
each stage declares domain-owned stage_completion_policy with closeout packet outcomes
OPL runtime only transports the next stage after the domain closeout packet is valid
cannot_be_satisfied_by: stage id listed without prompt/skill/knowledge/evaluation refs
conformance pass that does not inspect source shape
stage output without domain-owned completion policy
OPL/controller content judgment after provider completion

requires: generated CLI/MCP/Skill/product-entry/status/workbench surfaces route to domain handler targets or OPL hosted shells
direct and hosted accepted-answer shapes match
production caller migration evidence exists before old wrapper retirement
generated surface readout states false-authority flags
repo-local scheduler / queue / session store / workbench / status shell / generic wrapper / runtime watch / materializer residue is classified
each private platform residue has one decision: retain_authority_function, raise_to_opl_primitive, no_active_caller_delete_gate, tombstone_gate, or typed_blocker_gate
active callers, cannot_absorb_reason, allowed writes, forbidden authority, output refs, no-forbidden-write proof, and retirement gate are present
physical delete requires owner authorization or no-active-caller/tombstone gate
cannot_be_satisfied_by: OPL projection saying delete ready without domain owner decision

requires: ordinary App/CLI/operator path starts from current_owner_delta

raw worklist, replay packet, typed blocker group, provider trace, stage progress log, refs-only ledger, and private residue inventory are audit/detail until folded into owner answer, typed blocker, human gate, route-back, or hard gate
support planes cannot generate domain owner answer or ready declaration
stage-route currentness identity is explicit
terminal closeout precedes stale running projection
strict live current identity can be watched without duplicate hydrate
StageRun and current-control do not admit no-progress or stop-loss enforcement fields
no-progress remains advisory while canonical admission consumer is null
worker_source_stale fail-closes while attempts are active
cannot_be_satisfied_by: same-identity no-progress counter or launch freeze without an active canonical owner consumer

requires: generated or takeover target-agent work orders include target owner route, editable surface policy, source morphology proof, reviewer evidence where required, executor lease, no-forbidden-write proof, verification refs, rollback/canary refs, and expected target owner receipt or typed blocker return shape
missing target owner route, source shape, generated surface, private residue decision, no-forbidden-write proof, or owner answer shape returns typed blocker or developer work order

guard-missing typed blockers and error payloads include executor_launch_admission=blocked_before_executor_launch plus no_executor_launch_proof showing no Codex process, no target worktree, no absorption attempt, and no cleanup need
agent generator cannot sign target owner receipt, create target typed blocker, write target truth, or promote default agent without target owner evidence
negative conformance rejects provider completion as domain progress
negative conformance rejects classification-zero as physical cleanup
negative conformance rejects generated-ready as production caller migration
negative conformance rejects refs-only ledger as domain ready or Brand L5
negative conformance rejects domain-owned kernel classes copied into OPL substrate
cannot_be_satisfied_by: manual audit without test or owner evidence

representative_domain_kernel_samples.sample_label: target work-order currentness and target owner return shape

current_open_evidence_tails: production generated-surface caller migration across registered agent packages
cross-agent source morphology scan and negative conformance
representative live owner receipt / typed blocker / human gate / route-back scaleout
long-soak and real App/user-path owner evidence
